title: Budget
description: Iteration/token/dollar/wall-clock caps the loop ENFORCES (never a prose suggestion). Carried by a ticket (coordination budget the dispatcher enforces per window) and referenced wherever a bound is policy. Loop length dominates cost, so `iterations` and `tokens` are required; the loop surfaces a cap, it never burns through it (REQ-LOOP-005). Distinct from the vendored cell's inline engine budget (which adds no_progress_n); both are budgets, at different layers.

iterations.description: Hard iteration cap for the advancing loop.

tokens.description: Token ceiling; loop length dominates cost.

dollars.description: Optional dollar ceiling for the window.

wallclock_seconds.description: Wall-clock limit; the deadline the budget gate denies writes past.
